summary: Upgraded the Claim Scout paid-code bounty module with a generated bounty-forge texture, textured radar board styling, status-aware scout cards, responsive four-card desktop layout, and local-only gate language.

queries: GitHub issue triage duplicate detection bounty dashboard workflow payout clarity
Algora bounty issue board duplicate claim workflow GitHub paid code bounty
bug bounty triage dashboard duplicate risk proof of concept payout status UI
pattern_notes: Claimable issue workflows need payout clarity, duplicate status, local proof quality, and public-action gates separated visually.
The module keeps browser refresh, public claim/comment/PR, and payment actions locked behind explicit approval while showing local proof progress.
The texture uses issue-board and radar metaphors without text, logos, platform marks, or code snippets.

renderer_changes: Claim Scout cards now include status classes for visual treatment.
Claim Scout board uses the generated bounty-forge texture through lane visuals.
Desktop layout expands to four scout cards while mobile remains one-column.

checks.result: Passed with Parked verdict, texture loaded, 4 scout cards, 4 radar dots, no board or document overflow, no console errors, and next control moving focus from Target Signal to Duplicate Risk.
Passed with compact docked detail panel, texture loaded, 4 cards in a 2-column grid, 4 radar dots, no internal board scroll, no document overflow, and no console errors.
Passed with full-width 4-card grid, texture loaded, 4 radar dots, no internal board scroll, no document overflow, and no console errors.
